scenario.scene: Modern minimalist patio at golden hour, a low concrete planter with small ornamental grasses behind her, a folded teak deck chair to her right with a cream linen throw draped over it. Distant city skyline softly out of focus in the deep background. Warm low-angle sunlight.
scenario.outfit: Black square-neck cropped tank top, matching black mid-thigh tailored shorts, low-heeled brown leather sandals, a thin gold tennis bracelet, small gold huggie hoops. Hair down in soft beach waves. Subtle bronzy makeup with a soft glow.
scenario.pose: Standing on the patio facing the camera at a slight three-quarter angle, weight on her right leg, looking directly at the camera with a relaxed confident smile.
scenario.grip_or_placement: Right hand at chest level, thumb on the front face of the box, index and middle fingers on the back, ring and pinky tucked under, box angled slightly toward the camera so the front face catches the warm golden- hour light directly.
scenario.lighting: Strong warm golden-hour sunlight from a low angle on her right side, golden rim light across her right shoulder and right side of the box, deep amber tones across the patio, soft cool sky in the background.
scenario.palette: black tailored, warm gold, teak wood, deep amber, soft sky cool
resolves_failure_modes: strong directional warm light Step 2 matching
scenario.notes: Strong directional light is the cleanest test of Step 2 lighting hooks — golden rim is unmistakable.

step_1_output.step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a black square-neck cropped tank top and matching black mid-thigh tailored shorts, low-heeled brown leather sandals, a thin gold tennis bracelet, small gold huggie hoops, hair down in soft beach waves with a center part, subtle bronzy makeup with a soft glow. She stands on a modern minimalist patio at golden hour, a low concrete planter with small ornamental grasses behind her, a folded teak deck chair to her right, distant city skyline softly out of focus in the deep background. Standing facing the camera at a slight three-quarter angle, weight on her right leg, looking directly at the camera with a relaxed confident smile. Her right hand is at upper-chest level, palm facing forward, fingers in a relaxed pinch-ready position, currently empty. Her left hand rests at her side. Strong warm golden-hour sunlight from a low angle on her right side, golden rim light across her right shoulder, deep amber tones across the patio, soft cool sky in the background. 35mm lens, candid moment, slightly imperfect framing, real skin texture with sun-kissed warmth, real photograph not AI-generated, no model pose, golden-hour glow confident calm mood, palette of black tailored, warm gold, deep amber. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, extra fingers, fused fingers, distorted face, asymmetric eyes, unnatural skin texture, plastic skin, AI-generated look, model pose, perfect symmetry, smooth airbrushed skin, glossy plastic skin, illustration, 3D render, CGI, doll-like features, magazine retouching

product_slot.location_for_step_2: Right hand at upper-chest level, palm facing forward, fingers in a relaxed pinch-ready position — Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box held with thumb on the front face, index and middle fingers on the back, ring and pinky tucked under, box angled slightly toward the camera so the front face catches the warm golden-hour rim light directly.
product_slot.approximate_position_in_frame: upper-center-right, ~35% from top, ~55% from left, at chest level

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: Medium full mid-thigh up framing — face is mid-importance and strong directional golden-hour light flatters facial structure, so default id_weight is sufficient to preserve identity while allowing the new outfit and outdoor setting to override the reference photo.

step_2_output.step_2_image_prompt: Using Image 1 as the base scene and Image 2 as the product reference, place the Alluvi Tirzepatide product packaging from Image 2 into the woman's right hand at upper-chest level. Her thumb presses on the front face of the box, her index and middle fingers on the back, ring and pinky tucked under, the box held with the long side horizontal and angled slightly toward the camera so the front face is fully visible. The box should be sized realistically relative to her hand — approximately 7 inches wide, comparable to the length from her wrist to fingertips. Do not enlarge the box. Match the lighting direction, time of day, and shadow direction of Image 1. The product is lit by the same strong warm golden-hour sunlight from a low angle on her right side, with golden rim light catching the right edge of the box and a long soft shadow falling toward her left. Preserve the product's natural white packaging color from Image 2 — apply only the directional lighting and shadows of Image 1, do not shift the product's base white to match the amber scene cast. Maintain the exact branding, text, and graphics from Image 2 — do not hallucinate, modify, or alter the packaging label, text, or design in any way. Preserve everything else in Image 1 exactly — her face, body, pose, black tailored outfit, hair, the patio, the concrete planter, the teak deck chair, the distant city skyline, sky, and all existing lighting and shadows.
